title: Hook
description: An admin-registered extension point that fires INSIDE a run's single dispatch loop at one of five pinned points (spec §28.17, TOL-012). Never model-creatable — create + disable are admin API actions, and a hook output can never grant a capability. A remote_http hook reuses the T4 signed transport; a credential is a secret_ref handle only (the config carries non-secret wiring).

name.description: The admin management key; unique per project.

category.description: policy = sync fail-closed (a deny blocks the guarded operation visibly); transform = a schema-validated patch to before_tool.arguments / after_tool.result, fail-closed; observer = async fail-open (a crash never affects the operation).

executor.description: platform_inline names a code-defined deterministic, network-less handler; remote_http reuses the T4 signed remote-worker transport (tenant hook code never runs in-process).

disabled.description: The admin kill-switch: a disabled hook never fires.
